corrected_estimate_fyi.note: FYI ONLY — correction factor 1.434x NOT applied to official metrics

top_query.query: if you borrow $20,000 for 5 years at an annual rate of 8%, what would the monthly payment be
top_query.diagnosis: SNIPPET CANNIBALIZATION — Google shows answer ($405.53) directly in snippet. Phase 31 fix addresses this by changing H2 from answer-giveaway to curiosity question.

page_1_20000_loan_blog.recrawl_status: NOT RECRAWLED YET — fix deployed Jun 17, last crawl Jun 4. Google has not seen the new title/H2/meta.
page_1_20000_loan_blog.fix_summary: Title: answer-giveaway → curiosity hook. H2: '$405.53 — Here's the Full Breakdown' → 'What's the Monthly Payment...?'. CTA: 'Try it yourself' → 'See YOUR exact payment'. Description: more personalized.
page_1_20000_loan_blog.expected_effect: When Google recrawls, the curiosity-driven title and question-H2 should reduce snippet cannibalization and improve CTR from 0% to 1-3%.
page_1_20000_loan_blog.risk: Duplicate blog post exists at /blog/20000-loan-5-years-8-percent-monthly-payment (Discovered-not-indexed, in sitemap) — leeching crawl budget. Flagged for cleanup PLAN (not execution under Phase 31 freeze).

page_2_rent_vs_buy.fix_summary: Title broadened from '$100,000 Income specific' to general 'Rent vs Buy Calculator: Should You Rent or Buy a Home in 2026?' to capture broader queries.
page_2_rent_vs_buy.status: MONITORING — ultra-low volume (1 imp). Position 2.0 is excellent but query volume negligible.

page_3_how_much_house.fix_summary: Title refined: front-loaded 'Free Calculator', more action-oriented description.
page_3_how_much_house.status: MONITORING — ultra-low volume (1 imp). Position 6.0 is good but query volume negligible.
